case_title: YOOMIN SHIN VS. ASHTON SAN FRANCISCO APARTMENTS

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW INC

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHIN, YOOMIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ASHTON SAN FRANCISCO APARTMENTS $500.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $550.00, DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW INC. SHALL PAY ZERO. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-08-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-08-2018 BY PRO TEM JOANNE MADDEN. 506 PLAINTIFF YOONMIN SHIN IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ASHTON SAN FRANCISCO APARTMENTS IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY PRISCILLA NAVIA, PROPERTY MANAGER. DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE TOW INC. IS PRESENT, REPRESENTED BY FRANCISCO GUZMAN, OWNER/CEO. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: JOANNE MADDEN; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
